hero.heading: The Foothill miso shop.
hero.subheading: A small Japanese-American kitchen on Foothill Boulevard in Glendale. Ramen, donburi, katsu, salmon plates, and the kind of miso soup that's been simmering since open. Dine in, takeout, or call ahead.

about.label: the kitchen
about.heading: Small kitchen. Honest food.
paragraphs: MISO is a small Japanese-American restaurant that's been on Foothill Boulevard for years. One kitchen, a short menu, no shortcuts. The miso soup base is built from scratch every morning and simmers through service.
We serve ramen (tonkotsu, shoyu, miso, spicy), donburi bowls (chicken katsu, tonkatsu, beef, salmon), curry rice plates, and a short list of starters. Lunch portions are smaller and priced for it.
Open six days a week. Closed Sunday. Dine in, takeout, or call ahead. The 197 reviews come from regulars who eat here on their lunch break.

services.title: Tonkotsu Ramen
services.description: Twelve-hour pork bone broth, thin noodles, chashu, soft egg, scallion, nori. The bowl regulars order.

services.title: Miso Ramen
services.description: Red miso broth, ground pork, corn, butter, bean sprouts, soft egg. House sauce blend.

services.title: Chicken Katsu Don
services.description: Panko chicken cutlet, egg-and-onion bind, dashi, rice, scallion. The lunchtime regular's plate.

services.title: Salmon Teriyaki
services.description: Atlantic salmon, house teriyaki, rice, miso soup, pickle. Lighter than the ramen, just as filling.

services.title: Curry Rice
services.description: Slow-cooked Japanese curry, beef or chicken katsu, rice, pickled ginger. Comfort food.

services.title: Gyoza · 6 pc
services.description: Pan-fried pork-and-cabbage dumplings, ponzu, chili oil. Best ordered to share.

reviews.name: Kazu I.
reviews.text: MISO is the only ramen I trust between Glendale and Pasadena. The tonkotsu broth is silky, the chashu actually has fat marbling, and the egg yolk is the right shade of orange. I'm in twice a week.

reviews.name: Megan P.
reviews.text: Walked in cold on a Tuesday for chicken katsu don and was eating one of the best Japanese-American lunches I've had in LA twelve minutes later. The pickle on the side made the plate.

reviews.name: Daniel R.
reviews.text: Bring the kids here for ramen night every Friday. They split a gyoza and tear through their bowls. Service is fast, plates are honest, and the bill is reasonable for what hits the table.

seo.title: MISO — Glendale Japanese-American on Foothill Blvd
seo.description: A small Japanese-American kitchen on Foothill Boulevard, Glendale. Ramen, donburi, katsu, curry, salmon plates. Dine in or takeout. Open six days.
